name: Festo DSNU Round Cylinder 25mm Bore x 100mm Stroke
description: The Festo DSNU is a double-acting pneumatic cylinder with piston rod for industrial automation. This 25mm bore by 100mm stroke compact cylinder features adjustable end-position cushioning and a wide range of mounting accessories.
shortDescription: Double-acting pneumatic cylinder, 25mm bore, 100mm stroke, adjustable cushioning.
technicalDescription: ISO 6432 compliant round cylinder with 25mm bore and 100mm stroke. Double-acting with PPV (adjustable pneumatic cushioning at both ends). Self-adjusting piston seal and integrated wiper. Anodized aluminum barrel.
features: Self-adjusting piston seal for long life
Anodized aluminum barrel for corrosion resistance
benefits: Long service life with self-adjusting seals
Easy installation with multiple mounting options
seoDescription: Festo DSNU ISO 6432 pneumatic cylinder, 25mm bore, 100mm stroke, double-acting, adjustable cushioning. For automation and handling applications.

faq.question: What is the maximum operating frequency?
faq.answer: With 100mm stroke at 6 bar, maximum frequency is approximately 2-3 Hz depending on load and cushioning setting.

faq.question: What mounting accessories are available?
faq.answer: Foot mounts, flange mounts, clevis brackets, and pivot kits are available for the DSNU series.

faq.question: Can this cylinder be used for lateral loads?
faq.answer: Minimal lateral loads only. For lateral loads, use a guided cylinder or guide rods.

name: SMC SY5120 5/2-Way Solenoid Valve
description: The SMC SY5120 is a 5/2-way solenoid pilot-operated valve with a compact body and high flow rate. With a 1/8 inch port size and low power consumption, it provides reliable directional control for pneumatic actuators.
shortDescription: 5/2-way solenoid valve, single solenoid, spring return, G 1/8, 24 VDC.
technicalDescription: Pilot-operated 5/2-way spool valve with single solenoid and spring return. Low power consumption (1.2 W). Plug-in electrical connection with LED indicator. Suitable for lubricated or non-lubricated air.
features: Suitable for lubricated or non-lubricated air
benefits: Reduces energy consumption with low power coil
High flow reduces actuator cycle time
seoDescription: SMC SY5120 5/2-way pilot-operated solenoid valve, G 1/8, 24 VDC, 400 L/min. For pneumatic cylinder control and automation.

faq.question: What is the maximum operating pressure?
faq.answer: Maximum operating pressure is 0.7 MPa (7 bar / 100 psi).

faq.question: Can this valve be mounted in any orientation?
faq.answer: Yes, the valve can be mounted in any orientation without performance degradation.

faq.question: What is the IP rating?
faq.answer: With the standard electrical connection, the rating is IP40. IP65 is available with a protective cover.

name: Norgren RM-450 Rack and Pinion Rotary Actuator
description: The Norgren RM-450 is a rack and pinion rotary actuator providing 90° rotation for valve automation and material handling. With 450 Nm output torque at 5.5 bar, it provides reliable quarter-turn actuation.
shortDescription: Rack and pinion rotary actuator, 90° rotation, 450 Nm, double-acting.
technicalDescription: Double-acting rack and pinion pneumatic actuator with 90° rotation (adjustable ±5°). ISO 5211 mounting interface for direct valve mounting. Hard-anodized aluminum body with stainless steel fasteners.
features: Rack and pinion mechanism for reliable rotary motion
benefits: Direct mount to quarter-turn valves without brackets
seoTitle: Norgren RM-450 Rack & Pinion Rotary Actuator
seoDescription: Norgren RM-450 double-acting rotary actuator, 450 Nm, 90°, ISO 5211. For quarter-turn valve automation and damper control.

faq.question: What is the spring return torque?
faq.answer: For spring-return (fail-safe) versions, the spring end torque is typically 80% of the air end torque.

faq.question: What positioners are available?
faq.answer: Electropneumatic positioners with 4-20 mA input are available for modulating control.

faq.question: Can this be used for fail-safe operation?
faq.answer: Yes, spring-return (single-acting) variants are available for fail-safe open or closed operation.

name: Festo QSL Push-In Fitting G 1/8" x 8mm Tube
description: The Festo QSL is a push-in pneumatic fitting for quick and secure connection of 8mm tubing to G 1/8 ports. With a nickel-plated brass body and O-Ring seal, it provides leak-free connections in pneumatic systems.
shortDescription: Push-in fitting, G 1/8" thread, 8mm tube OD, nickel-plated brass.
technicalDescription: Push-in L-type connector with integrated O-ring sealing at the thread. Suitable for 8mm OD PU, PA, or PE tubing. Working pressure range -0.95 to 10 bar with full vacuum capability.
features: Nickel-plated brass body for corrosion resistance
O-ring thread seal eliminates need for sealant tape
Wide working pressure and temperature range
benefits: Reduces installation time by 50% vs threaded fittings
seoTitle: Festo QSL Push-In Fitting G 1/8" x 8mm
seoDescription: Festo QSL-1/8-8 push-in pneumatic fitting, G 1/8" to 8mm tube, nickel-plated brass. For fast, leak-free pneumatic connections.

faq.question: What tubing types are compatible?
faq.answer: Compatible with PU (polyurethane), PA (polyamide), and PE (polyethylene) tubing of 8mm outer diameter.

faq.question: How do I release the tube?
faq.answer: Press the blue release ring evenly while pulling the tube outward to release.

faq.question: What is the maximum operating temperature?
faq.answer: Maximum operating temperature is +80°C with standard NBR O-ring.

name: Festo PUN Pneumatic Tubing 8mm x 1.25mm (50m Coil)
description: Festo PUN polyurethane tubing is a flexible pneumatic connection line for compressed air systems. This 50m coil of 8mm OD tubing is halogen-free, hydrolysis-resistant, and suitable for industrial automation.
shortDescription: PU pneumatic tubing, 8mm OD x 1.25mm wall, 50m coil, blue.
technicalDescription: Extruded polyurethane tubing with 8mm outer diameter and 1.25mm inner diameter. High flexibility with a minimum bend radius of 35mm. Resistant to hydrolysis, microbes, and UV. Halogen-free per DIN VDE 0472.
features: Polyurethane for high flexibility and durability
UV resistant for long service life
benefits: Tight bend radius simplifies routing in confined spaces
Resists kinking for reliable air supply
Long service life in industrial environments
seoDescription: Festo PUN polyurethane pneumatic tubing, 8mm OD, 50m coil, blue. Flexible, halogen-free, hydrolysis-resistant for industrial compressed air.

faq.question: What is the maximum operating pressure?
faq.answer: Maximum working pressure is 10 bar at 23°C. Pressure decreases to 6 bar at 60°C.

faq.question: Can this tubing be used for food applications?
faq.answer: Yes, the FDA-compliant variant is available for food contact applications.

faq.question: What colors are available?
faq.answer: Blue (standard), transparent, black, yellow, and green are available for color-coded circuits.
